Building a voice engine that analyzes V's LinkedIn posts and comments... Goal: Generate AI drafts that pass Pangram (AI detection tool). Challenge: Even with voice analysis, content still triggers AI detection.

Anthropic closed Claude Code access to third-party platforms, affecting Zo. V paid $100 for max plan just before the access was revoked.

Built an interview feedback tool using Zo's new Stripe integration in a single prompt. The tool accepts a JD and interview transcript, generates structured feedback with grades per question. Amanda tested it and found the feedback 'very, very decent, very constructive'.

Shane identifies V as Calendly's ICP: 'people juggling a ton of things, managing relationships, not in sales necessarily'. Core ICP: People who sell their time (tax advisors, coaches, therapists). Key insight: These customers 'don't have CRMs'.
Directly help you make money is E-commerce. Indirectly help you make money is careers. Careers vertical as strategic focus for Zo users.
